title: WCBS Review Finding
description: One review finding and its lifecycle. A fix attempt does not clear a finding: OPEN -> FIXED_PENDING_REVIEW -> CLEARED requires an independent re-review of the same scope.

severity.description: BLOCKING, CRITICAL and IMPORTANT are material: each must complete fix -> named covering tests -> recorded result -> same-scope re-review.

state.description: CANNOT_VERIFY_FROM_DIFF maps to evidence state Unknown and blocks a final PASS until resolved or explicitly accepted.

evidence.description: File-and-line evidence is mandatory. A finding without a location is not a finding.

covering_tests.description: Named tests the fix agent must rerun and record.

opened_by.description: Canonical role that opened the finding. An external or independent reviewer performing the final cumulative review records as final_reviewer; a task-scoped reviewer records as task_reviewer.

cleared_by.description: Must be a reviewer role, never the fix agent.

note.description: Free-text rationale: why the finding matters, how it was found, or why a disposition was chosen. Declared explicitly so a finding ledger does not have to violate this schema to record it.
